projectName: Jakks First Order Stormtrooper Battle Buddy
title: Jakks First Order Stormtrooper Battle Buddy (48 in)
description: Jakks First Order Stormtrooper Battle Buddy — electronics repair and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails: Jakks Pacific Star Wars: The Force Awakens First Order Stormtrooper Battle Buddy (Colossal Big-Figs line; ~48 in / 122 cm tall). Full-body white and black First Order armour sculpt; TRY ME retail packaging indicates built-in electronics—motion presence detection with movie lines and sound effects; poseable elbow for blaster arm. UPC 039897908335 documented. Materials: moulded plastic, battery compartment (typical for Jakks large figs). Market: 2015–2016 retail (~AUD/USD $50–100 when new); oversized display/collectible, heavy and bulky for storage. Sources: Zavvi / UPC listings; eBay Battle Buddy descriptions.
repairDetails: Giant Stormtrooper (legacy site gallery — short caption only; expand story when details are available).
